mechanics.excerpt: CHWARRIOR Jrd Edvt TIME Of WAR For almost thousand years; humans have journeyed into the far reaches of space, colonizing thousands of worlds and forming star-spanning alliances_ From tnese grew the five vast star empires that make up the Inner Sphere: The Inner Sphere was rife with division as the ruling dynasties warred constantly over colony worlds with valuable resources_ These titanic struggles led to the development of BattleMechs: gigantic, humanoid battle machines bristling with Iethal weapons From the twenty-fifth century onward, these walking tanks ruled the battlefields_ As the price of conflict grew; the Inner Sphere tired of war: Eventually.
